overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character running along a forest path during an overcast afternoon. The character traverses from an open meadow with white wildflowers into increasingly dense pine forest, passing wild boars and traditional stone markers along the winding dirt trail.

events.description: wild boars appear grazing on the right side of the path among the tall grass

agents.ego_description: samurai character jogging steadily along the dirt path through the open meadow, sword visible on back

notable_agents.action: group of wild boars grazing in the tall grass beside the path

entered.detail: clusters of white wildflowers lining both sides of the path
dense forest of tall pine trees visible in the distance ahead
winding dirt trail cutting through the grassy meadow
gently sloping hill covered in tall green grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide grassy meadow with the samurai character running along a dirt path. White wildflowers dot the landscape on both sides while wild boars graze peacefully on the right. The sky is overcast with dark storm clouds, and a dense pine forest looms in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: pine forest path with dappled sunlight

events.description: passing a traditional stone lantern on the left as the forest becomes denser

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the winding path as the trees close in and the canopy begins to cover the sky

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lantern (tōrō) beside the path
simple wooden fence visible through the trees on the right

segments.scene_description: The character enters the pine forest where the path becomes shaded by the canopy. A traditional stone lantern appears on the left side of the trail. The white flowers and open hills give way to dense undergrowth and closely spaced trees, with a wooden fence visible in the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense old-growth forest with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: running deeper into the dense forest where tall trees block most of the sky and the path winds between rocky formations

entered.detail: large gray rock formation visible through the trees on the left
fallen tree trunks and logs beside the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a deeply shaded forest with towering pine trees that block most of the sky. The path becomes more enclosed as it winds past large rock outcrops on the left and fallen logs. The wooden fence draws closer on the right side while the character continues running through the dim, atmospheric woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a samurai runs from an open, wildflower-strewn meadow into the depths of a dark, atmospheric pine forest. It begins on a dirt path under an overcast sky, passing grazing wild boars and white blossoms that line the wide landscape. As the character advances, the open hills give way to a shaded canopy where the lighting dims and a traditional stone lantern appears beside the trail. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed woodland, with the surrounding undergrowth thickening and a wooden fence emerging on the right. Finally, the path winds past large rock outcrops and fallen logs beneath towering pines that almost entirely block out the storm clouds above.
